title: Polestar Automotive Holding UK (PSNY) Stock Investors Activity & Sentiment
text: Retail investor activity in PSNY remains muted, with only 1.4% of TipRanks' retail investors changing their holdings in the last 30 days. Retail investors allocate an average of 4.79% to PSNY based on 719,244 active investor portfolios, indicating moderate retail exposure. Polestar's earnings call sentiment is neutral, presenting a mixed but improving picture with record retail volumes, strong revenue growth (+50% YoY), and meaningful margin improvements. However, analysts maintain conflicting sentiments on Polestar's prospects. Recent analyst commentary highlights ongoing concerns about tariff pressures, liquidity constraints, and the path to profitability. Cantor Fitzgerald's downgrade to Underweight with a $0.00 price target represents the most bearish call, while Barclays maintains a $15 price target reflecting more constructive positioning. Institutional ownership remains dominated by Geely and Volvo, which together maintain control of approximately 69% of outstanding shares. The low retail participation suggests limited retail investor confidence despite the company's growth narratives. Dividend risk is not a concern given the company's loss-making position and capital needs.
